provenance.summary: All files in this folder are original, synthetic 'internal policy' style text for demos. They are not scraped from the web, not from customer data, and not from a public dataset — so you can index them in a demo without license surprises.
provenance.if_you_want_public_sources: You can replace or augment these with explicitly licensed text (e.g. CC0 / public domain) from government open data, Project Gutenberg, or your own policies. If you do, update this manifest and re-run the Streamlit 'Build index' step.

documents.title: Security policy summary
example_questions: How quickly do we need to report suspected phishing?
How soon does security start triage for critical incidents?
What kind of data counts as sensitive company data?

documents.title: Employee onboarding
example_questions: When do new hires need to finish security training?
When do employees get access to the analytics workspace?

documents.title: Travel reimbursement
example_questions: When is manager approval required for travel?

documents.title: Customer support SLA
example_questions: What is the first response target for a Priority 1 support issue?
